response.original_title: 機動戦士ガンダム THE ORIGIN 第一章 シャア・セイラ編
response.overview: UNIVERSAL CENTURY 0068, the AUTONOMOUS REPUBLIC OF MUNZO. Zeon Zum Deikun collapses and passes away during a speech declaring complete independence from the EARTH Federation government. His close aide Jimba suspects a conspiracy by the Zabi Family, who are plotting to seize power. Amidst this, a cruel fate awaits the orphaned Casval and the others.
response.title: MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM THE ORIGIN Chapter 1: Chronicle of Char and Sayla
